scenarios.title: Inbound webhook becomes a canonical AssistantMessage
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: signed webhook integration must produce canonical AssistantMessage

scenarios.title: Unsigned or wrongly signed webhooks are rejected
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: live webhook rejection must prove facade is not invoked

scenarios.title: AssistantResponse renders to the correct WhatsApp message type
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: e2e-api row must observe WhatsApp interactive message family

scenarios.title: Mapping is exhaustive with a text fallback
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: unit golden coverage is required before live render coverage

scenarios.title: Capture-as-fallback acknowledgement is identical to Telegram and HTTP
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration row must prove capture hook executes once

scenarios.title: SST credentials are required and fail loud when enabled
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: unit config validation proves missing enabled secret fails loud

scenarios.title: Disabling WhatsApp leaves Telegram and HTTP unaffected
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration and e2e-api rows must prove other transports continue working

scenarios.title: Disambiguation / confirm / reset round-trip identically
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: e2e-api row must drive real facade round-trip

scenarios.title: No silent template wrapping for normal replies
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: unit policy test blocks template wrapping for normal replies

scenarios.title: Idempotency on Meta retries
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration and e2e-api rows must prove duplicate delivery invokes facade once
